description_long: This is a heavily armored, dark green combat tactical vehicle with a rounded, almost beetle-like body and a prominent white flag mounted on its roof. The vehicle features thick, reinforced armor plating covering the entire body, with visible hatches and access panels on the sides. Large, circular headlights and a set of four rear lights are integrated into the front and back, respectively, while the wheels are partially enclosed by the armored body. Distinctive white military markings, including crosses and stylized symbols, are painted on the hood, roof, and sides. The vehicle's design suggests a focus on protection and urban maneuverability, with minimal visible weapon mounts and a streamlined, utilitarian appearance. The overall finish is matte, with a subdued, non-reflective surface.
description: A heavily armored, matte dark green tactical vehicle with a rounded body, white flag, and prominent military markings. It features thick armor, enclosed wheels, and minimal visible weapon mounts.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded armored nose, two large headlights, a central vent, and a white cross marking.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the side hatch, white flag on the roof, and stylized white markings near the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displays four circular rear lights, a large white cross on the back, and a license plate.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, with a side hatch, white flag, and white markings near the rear.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, rounded armor plating; reinforced hatches and doors; no visible modular or reactive panels.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid dark green color with no visible camouflage pattern.
attribute_military_markings: White cross on front and rear, stylized white symbols on roof and sides, and a license plate on the rear.
attribute_tire_type: Four large, partially enclosed tires with minimal visible tread; likely all-terrain.
